aw_pr_geometry_tests.desc: test(bubbletree): add unit tests for geometry.go and transforms.go - 24 new tests for enclosing-circle geometry and coordinate transform helpers

maintainer_preferences: Do not move helpers to new packages
go.mod and go.sum are protected files - cannot be pushed by automation
.github/workflows/* are ALL protected - cannot be pushed by automation
Keep PRs strictly scoped to description
REJECTED: accumulator pattern with *[]T pointer parameters - maintainer called it 'nasty coupling' and 'short-sighted' (rejected PRs #488, #489, #507)
notes: Run 28952600875 (2026-07-08): Tasks 3->2 (no bug issues), 2, 4->5, 11. CRITICAL PREFERENCE CHANGE: maintainer rejected PRs #488, #489, #507 for using *[]T accumulator pattern - 'nasty coupling' and 'short-sighted'. Do NOT use accumulator pattern in future. PRs #508 (#perf-scatter) and #509 (#refactor-treemap) merged from previous run. PR #502 merged (SVG fillAttr). Task 2: Commented on #330 noting PR #502 merged and issue is fully resolved. Task 5: Created PR aw_pr_geometry_tests - 24 new tests for enclosing-circle geometry (geometry_test.go) and coordinate transforms (transforms_test.go) - these files were recently extracted from layout.go but had no direct tests. Issues #330 and #324 are ready to close.
